title: docfresh — AGENT_CONTRACT.md catches up automatically when a decision touches dumb-agent-visible rules

evidence.ref: D021 (688eda6) and D024 (fdf029c) are both pure AGENT_CONTRACT.md catch-up decisions absorbing D015..D020 and D022..D023 respectively — 2 of 24 decisions are SSOT-mirror cleanup with no executable change; one full round-trip per occurrence
021-agent-contract-doc-current-with-fixture-rules — first occurrence of the recurring catch-up pattern
024-agent-contract-d022-d023 — second occurrence; confirmed the pattern is recurring, not one-off

guards.ref: tools/docfresh check — diffs PR against base, loads each added decision record, requires AGENT_CONTRACT.md in the diff when any guards[].ref matches the dumb-agent-visible rule regex
.github/workflows/contracts.yml — 'docfresh — AGENT_CONTRACT.md must catch up' step, runs on pull_request events only

internal/docfresh/docfresh_test.go TestIsAgentVisible (8 cases incl. docfresh self-reference) + TestCheckPasses + TestCheckFlagsMissingDocUpdate + TestCheckIgnoresNonAgentVisibleDecisions + TestCheckMultipleViolations + TestIsDecisionPath
concept-map C-013 — codifies the rule and the dumb-agent-visible rule surface

examples: D023 added internal/probe.noiseMarkerReason; D024 had to ship later as a pure catch-up. After D025: D023's analogue would fail docfresh until AGENT_CONTRACT.md is in the same PR (a 1-line note suffices), eliminating the second-round-trip cost.

D025's own guards reference internal/docfresh and tools/docfresh — neither matches the agent-visible regex, so D025 is not subject to its own rule. A one-line note was added to AGENT_CONTRACT.md voluntarily so future authors know docfresh exists.

D022 added tools/ssotdeps cross-check; guards[].ref contains 'tools/ssotdeps' (NOT in agent-visible list because dumb-agent doesn't read dep map) — docfresh does NOT require AGENT_CONTRACT.md update for D022-class decisions.
counterexamples: Adding a guard with kind=go-tool but ref pointing only at contracts-CI tooling (ssotdeps, conceptmap, irdrift) does not trigger the rule — those rules don't affect what dumb-agent reads.
Editing AGENT_CONTRACT.md without adding a decision is unaffected — docfresh only fires when an added decision lacks a doc touch, not the reverse.
Future agent-visible surfaces must be added to internal/docfresh.agentVisibleGuardRe via a superseding decision; silent regex edits are caught by agentguard (designer-only file).
